auth.secretsPolicy: Do not commit credentials, cookies, tokens, or private session dumps.

dataMode.prodPolicy: Production data requires explicit approval and is read-only unless exact writes are separately approved.

automation.notes: Add runnable E2E commands that an AI can execute without rediscovering the flow.

logging.notes: Add dev server, device, network, or app log commands when verified.

regression.notes: Add lint, test, typecheck, build, or existing E2E commands.
